channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Giants owner John Mara gets another aerial message trashing his team before loss to Ravens
item.description: New York Giants co-owner John Mara received another aerial message trashing his woeful team before Sunday's 35-14 loss to the Baltimore Ravens. It was the second straight week that a plane was hired to circle the stadium in protest of the Giants’ seventh losing season since 2017.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Miami WR DuBose taken off the field on a stretcher after hit to the head against Texans
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Miami receiver Grant DuBose was hospitalized in stable condition and undergoing further evaluation after being taken off the field on a stretcher following a helmet-to-helmet hit against the Houston Texans on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Southampton fires Russell Martin after 5-0 rout by Spurs on a bad day for Premier League managers
item.description: SOUTHAMPTON, England (AP) — Southampton fired manager Russell Martin late Sunday after the Premier League's last-placed team was thrashed 5-0 by Tottenham. Southampton has only won once in the league this season and is nine points adrift of safety.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pep Guardiola says 'I'm not good enough' after latest Man City loss
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Pep Guardiola declared himself “not good enough” after Manchester City's season sunk to a new low after a 2-1 defeat to Manchester United on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Freddie Freeman's walk-off grand slam ball sells for $1.56 million at auction
item.description: LAGUNA NIGUEL, Calif. (AP/WGN) — Freddie Freeman’s historic walk-off grand slam ball from Game 1 of the World Series has sold for $1.56 million at auction.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lessons learned: Mater Dei coach finally beats De La Salle
item.description: Mater Dei coach Raul Lara sheds light on what he learned more than two decades after De La Salle beat his Long Beach Poly teams in back-to-back years.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Jack Hughes helps the Devils rally for a 4-1 victory over the Blackhawks
item.description: Jack Hughes scored his 13th goal during a big third period for New Jersey, helping the Devils beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-1 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Sixers standout rookie Jared McCain is out indefinitely with a torn meniscus that requires surgery
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers rookie Jared McCain has a meniscus tear in his left knee that requires surgery and is expected to be out indefinitely.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bill Belichick showed interest in unlikely coaching gig before taking UNC job: reports
item.description: Bill Belichick apparently didn't due his due diligence before taking the UNC job. The former Patriots coach reportedly showed interest in the New York Jets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump, close allies attend Army-Navy rivalry game
item.description: As national concerns about the drones spotted on the East Coast continue to mount, President-elect Trump is attending the Army-Navy game.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego FC debuts inaugural jersey design for players
item.description: The first-ever jersey design for players of San Diego FC has been unveiled — and fans can already buy it.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Utah shuts down Colorado for fifth straight road victory
item.description: DENVER (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is turning into a team of road warriors. Dylan Guenther scored two goals and an assist to give him a team-leading 12 goals on the season, while Karel Vejmelka made 22 saves, as Utah shut down the Colorado Avalanche Thursday night, 4-1.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Basketball: Bishop's 60, Olympian 34
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls hoops on Tuesday night with Olympian playing at Bishop's. The Knights were lead by Moana Peterson, junior guard poured in 15 and added a few steals. Also chipped with quite a few assists as well. Final score in this one Bishop's won 60-34.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: White Sox trade Garrett Crochet to Red Sox for prospect package
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago White Sox have traded ace starter Garrett Crochet to the Red Sox for a prospect package. The White Sox are getting back catcher Kyle Teel, who is the 25th ranked prospect in baseball by MLB.com.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Lawmaker wants ‘flag planting’ at OSU to be a felony
item.description: Days after the postgame melee, a lawmaker introduced a bill that would make “flag planting” within Ohio Stadium a felony.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, NewsNation

item.title: Rocky Colavito, 9-time All-Star outfielder and one of Cleveland's most popular athletes, dies at 91
item.description: Rocky Colavito, a wildly popular outfielder who was involved in one of the most debated trades in Cleveland sports history, has died. He was 91.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah HC loses to Minnesota in shootout, 5-4
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Marcus Johansson had a goal and two assists for the Minnesota Wild, who rallied for a 5-4 shootout win against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Miami's Ward, Oregon's Gabriel, Colorado's Hunter, Boise State’s Jeanty, are named Heisman finalists
item.description: Oregon's Dillon Gabriel, Colorado's Travis Hunter, Boise State’s Ashton Jeanty, and Miami's Cam Ward were announced as the Heisman Trophy finalists on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON AP College Football Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Silver Pigskin Finalist starts at Quarterback for Iowa Hawkeyes
item.description: Most walk-on players in college football never get the opportunity to take the field, especially not at quarterback, and certainly not for a Power Four football program like the Iowa Hawkeyes. But La Jolla alum Jackson Stratton has done just that.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Arlington Heights village board unanimously approves tax deal with Bears, 3 local school districts
item.description: The Village of Arlington Heights Board of Trustees is set to vote on a tentative property tax deal with the Chicago Bears and three local school districts, which would save the Bears $5.4 million a year in property taxes and establish a timeline for the Bears to decide on building a new stadium in t
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox announce MLB coaching staff under first-year manager Will Venable
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have finalized their 2025 Major League coaching staff, adding two new faces in bench coach Walker McKinven and assistant hitting coach Joel McKeithan, and retaining the rest of the staff from the 2024 season.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Dodgers reach $17M, 1-year deal with Conforto and $22M, 2-year contract with Treinen, AP sources say
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers agreed to a $17 million, one-year contract to add outfielder Michael Conforto and a $22 million, two-year deal to retain right-hander Blake Treinen, people familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Juan Soto agrees to record $765 million, 15-year contract with Mets, AP source says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Star outfielder Juan Soto and the New York Mets agreed Sunday to a record $765 million, 15-year contract, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press. The deal could escalate to $805 million and is believed to be the largest pact in team sports history.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9
